ops.title: Release repo-bootstrap v0.41.0 (native layout scaffold, settings-from-fragments, legacy-init deletion)
ops.description: Scaffold native .claude/fragments/<target>/ layout dirs with explicit [sources.cc-skills] (replacing AGENTS.src.md / CLAUDE.src.md / templates/plugin/install-binary.src.sh v1 sources); scaffold .claude/settings.json as a json layout dir importing cc-skills:settings-base + language variant + local.fragment.json; guides.yml stub template cron → daily; delete legacy-init machinery; bump plugin version to 0.41.0 (plugin cache keys on version). Follow-on cc-guides cleanup afterwards (separate pass): remove renderV1, v1compat.go + transition default, v1 directive machinery, legacy ParseBanner recognition, AddBanner. Blocked by: cc-guides manifest+lock+JSON release, cc-skills plugin/guides/json settings fragments on main.

ops.text: A scratch repo bootstrapped with v0.41.0 has .claude/fragments layout dirs (no *.src.* files), a green first `cc-guides check`, and a lock-registered rendered .claude/settings.json
repo-bootstrap plugin.json version is 0.41.0 and the legacy-init code paths are deleted
Scaffolded guides.yml stub uses a daily cron
